torch_pattern:
input_nchw, torch_padding = prepare_torch_pool_input(input_tensor, batch_size, input_h, input_w, channels, padding, pad_fill_value=float("-inf"))
output_tensor, indices = torch.nn.functional.max_pool2d(input_nchw, kernel_size=kernel_size, stride=stride, padding=torch_padding, dilation=dilation, ceil_mode=ceil_mode, return_indices=True)
output_tensor = pool_output_to_flat_nhwc(output_tensor)

config_template.input_tensor: {INPUT}  # flattened NHWC tensor of shape (1, 1, N*H*W, C), ROW_MAJOR layout

applicability_notes: Operates on channels-last flattened (1,1,N*H*W,C) ROW_MAJOR input, unlike torch NCHW. Padding may be symmetric [ph,pw] or explicit 4-list [top,bottom,left,right]; torch golden pads with -inf for asymmetric cases. Supports return_indices (indices returned in flat NHWC). A 3D max-pool can be decomposed into two chained max_pool2d calls (spatial HxW pool with batch=N*D, then depth pool with kernel [k,1] over (D, OH*OW)), as seen in call sites.

placement_observations.source: test: ttnn.from_torch(input_tensor, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device) -> ttnn.max_pool2d (default interleaved DRAM)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: (N, C, H, W) intermediate, converted before pooling
placement_observations.source: call_site: tt_x = ttnn.to_layout(tt_x, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT); ttact_d = ttnn.to_device(tt_x, device); ttnn.max_pool2d(input_tensor=ttact_d, ...)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: (1, 1, N*H*W, conv1_output_channels) activation following first conv in ResNet-style stem

memory_config.shard_spec_template: HEIGHT_SHARDED (input_sharded_memory_config; commented re-shard at call site, tensor produced sharded by preceding conv)

placement_observations.source: call_site: x = ttnn.reallocate(x_rm); # x = ttnn.to_memory_config(x, self.max_pool.max_pool.input_sharded_memory_config); ttnn.max_pool2d(input_tensor=x, kernel_size=[3,3], stride=[2,2], padding=[1,1])

placement_observations.size_descriptor: (1, 1, N*OH*OW, C) output of conv1, consumed directly without re-spilling

memory_config.shard_spec_template: inherits sharded memory config from preceding conv2d output

placement_observations.source: call_site: x1, out_ht, out_wdth = self.conv1(x); ttnn.deallocate(x); x1 = ttnn.max_pool2d(x1, ...)
